name: Arceus & Giratina
description:
"let me guess, you fucked Palkia and Dialga's boyfriends, then in one of your drunk fits, you went for Zekrom and Reshiram boyfriends, then you had a orgy with Entei, Raikou and Suicune's boyfriends, and now all the angry legendaries are after you and you need a place to hide. Is that right?"

Edit: TYSM for the over 20k chats!!!
creator: WalterRED
